zh.Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal: 葡萄牙布拉加布拉加澤可拉
zh.lifeSummary: 當D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra於1170年出生在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉時，她的父親D. Vasco Paes Vasques51歲，母親Ermezenda Martins de Goes21歲。她於大約1189年與Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1230年在她的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在葡萄牙。

zh-hans.Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal: 葡萄牙布拉加布拉加澤可拉
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra于1170年出生在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉时，她的父亲D. Vasco Paes Vasques51岁，母亲Ermezenda Martins de Goes21岁。她于大约1189年与Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1230年在她的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在葡萄牙。

meanings: Portuguese: habitational name from the city of Coimbra.

nameMeanings.name: Maria

meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Vasques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Vasco  .

variants.name: Vasco
meanings: Contracted form of the medieval Spanish personal name Velasco or Belasco, from which is derived the surname Velásquez. The modern name has the same form as the Spanish adjective vasco ‘Basque’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra was born in 1170, in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, her father, D. Vasco Paes Vasques, was 51 and her mother, Ermezenda Martins de Goes, was 21. She married Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" about 1189. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1230, in her hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra est née en 1170, à Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, son père, D. Vasco Paes Vasques, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Ermezenda Martins de Goes, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" environ 1189. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra 1170 in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater D. Vasco Paes Vasques 51 und ihre Mutter Ermezenda Martins de Goes 21. Sie hat um 1189 Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1230 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra è nata il nel 1170 nel Coimbra, Coimbra, Portogallo, sua padre, D. Vasco Paes Vasques, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Ermezenda Martins de Goes, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" circa 1189. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Portogallo.

ja.Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal: ポルトガルブラガブラガセクエイラ
ja.lifeSummary: D. Maria Vasques de Coimbraが1170年にポルトガルコインブラコインブラで生まれた時，父D. Vasco Paes Vasquesは51歳，母Ermezenda Martins de Goesは21歳であった。約1189年にPedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1230年に故郷で60歳で死去し，ポルトガルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra(이)가 1170년 포르투갈 코임브라 코임브라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 D. Vasco Paes Vasques(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermezenda Martins de Goes(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1189년 Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1230년 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra nasceu em 1170, em Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, seu pai, D. Vasco Paes Vasques, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Ermezenda Martins de Goes, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" aproximadamente 1189. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1230, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra родилась в 1170 г. в местности коимбра, коимбра, Португалия, её отцу по имени D. Vasco Paes Vasques было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Ermezenda Martins de Goes, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" около 1189 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1230 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra nació en 1170, en Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, su papá, D. Vasco Paes Vasques, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Ermezenda Martins de Goes, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" aproximadamente 1189. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Portugal.
